programme.desc: Haley, staunchly anti-marriage, tries on her grandma's magical veil and sees her future with boyfriend Scott.

programme.title: Eat, Drink and be Married
programme.desc: Billie helps save a wedding—and maybe finds love herself—in this charming romantic twist!

programme.title: Eat, Drink and be Married
programme.desc: Billie helps save a wedding—and maybe finds love herself—in this charming romantic twist!

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: Are We There Yet? (2005)
programme.desc: Ice Cube plays Nick, a playboy bachelor and sports memorabilia collector who dates a divorced mother of two young kids who never like the men their mom dates. Things go awry when Nick offers to drive the kids from Portland to Vancouver where their mother is stuck for work.

programme.title: Are We There Yet? (2005)
programme.desc: Ice Cube plays Nick, a playboy bachelor and sports memorabilia collector who dates a divorced mother of two young kids who never like the men their mom dates. Things go awry when Nick offers to drive the kids from Portland to Vancouver where their mother is stuck for work.

programme.title: Gigli
programme.desc: This unconventional romantic comedy starring Ben Affleck and Jennifer Lopez is about a low-level hood, Larry Gigli, who is given an assignment that gets him in way over his head. Ricki, a gorgeous free spirited female enforcer, is sent in to assist him. Gigli finds himself falling for the unavailable Ricki and goes to great lengths to win her affection.

programme.title: Shades of Zorro
programme.desc: Two brothers, Billy and Dan, head to California, determined to hunt down and kill Zorro to avenge the death of their brother.

programme.title: 10,000 Dollars for a Massacre
programme.desc: 10,000 Dollars for a Massacre - Django has become a bounty hunter who is asked to chase a villain who has kidnapped a young girl.

programme.title: Viva! Django
programme.desc: Django is on the trail of some renegade outlaws who raped and killed his wife. En route, he rescues a horse thief from an impromptu hanging. He discovers the man knows who committed the murder. The men team up and head west for revenge.

programme.title: A Coffin from Sartana
programme.desc: After witnessing a brutal massacre, the legendary hero Sartana is ready to do some investigating. Almost everyone in the tiny town of Indian Creek seems eager to buy up the property left behind by the murder victims, ...

programme.title: Birthday Present
programme.desc: When Simon Scott's attempt to smuggle a watch through customs for his wife's birthday present is discovered he is charged by the police and, due to a bungling defense by his solicitor, obliged to serve a prison sentence. His employer, Colonel Wilson, is sympathetic, but has to sack him and Simon discovers that finding another job is extremely difficult. But Colonel Wilson is determined to help him and eventually a solution is reached.

programme.title: Happiest Days of Your Life
programme.desc: Confusion at The Ministry results in a girls school being joined with a boys school, in this rip roaring, laugh a minute, classic English farce.

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: A harmless s√©ance summons up an unwanted ghost in this Noel Coward play.

programme.title: Folly to Be Wise
programme.desc: When Captain Paris takes over at a big army camp as Chaplain and Entertainments Officer, the troops are in for some surprises. Captain Paris finds the Garrison Theatre ill attended, as the troops favor the local hostelries in preference to the succession of feminine string quartets and madrigal singers hitherto engaged for their amusement. Paris sets out to remedy this sad state of affairs, but his idea of staging a Brains Trust with local celebrities as the 'brains' turns out to have disastrous results!

programme.title: Genevieve
programme.desc: Cheerful British comedy set against the London to Brighton car rally.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target.

programme.title: The White King
programme.desc: Djata is a care-free 12-year-old growing up in a brutal dictatorship shut off from the outside world. When the government imprisons his father, Peter, and Djata and his mother Hannah are labeled traitors, the boy will not rest until he sees his father again.

programme.title: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: A futuristic solar home in the far desert was supposed to be their refuge from urban crime. To their horror, the family discovers they're caught in a mind-boggling time warp caused by mysterious aliens with a sinister secret.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time.

programme.title: Infinitum: Subject Unknown
programme.desc: In this mind-bending sci-fi, Jane must find a way to alter her reality before it is too late. Featuring Sir Ian McKellen.

programme.title: Murder 101: Locked Room Mystery
programme.desc: A criminology professor and a private eye investigate a murder at a new age retreat

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Deadly Deed
programme.desc: When a banker is found dead in a Victorian mansion, Shannon Hughes finds herself within another murder case. Starring Jewel (2018)

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard Mysteries: Poisoned In Paradise
programme.desc: (2021) Crime mystery with Jesse Metcalfe and Sarah Lind. When a waitress is poisoned after seeking his help, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson unravel what she had been trying to warn him about?

programme.title: The Whistleblower
programme.desc: High-tension drama based on the experiences of a Nebraska cop who served as a peacekeeper in post-war Bosnia and outed the U.N. for covering up a sex trafficking scandal. Starring Rachel Weisz (2010)

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Mask of Zorro
programme.desc: A sweeping tale of love and honor, tragedy and triumph set against the Spanish conquest of Mexico, THE MASK OF ZORRO stars Anthony Hopkins and Antonio Banderas. After twenty years as the legendary Zorro, Don Diego (Hopkins) must transform a troubled drifter (Banderas) into the fearless hero he oncewas.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four drifters arrive in a small frontier town and become unlikely heroes in a battle against a powerful family and a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four drifters arrive in a small frontier town and become unlikely heroes in a battle against a powerful family and a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: Silent Rage
programme.desc: A crazed man who has killed a number of people with an ax is arrested by the small town's sheriff, Dan Stevens. But this is no ordinary psycho, and he breaks the handcuffs and heads for the hills. The sheriff finds that he must destroy this murderous killer who has been made indestructible through genetic engineering.

programme.title: A Memory In My Heart
programme.desc: Rebecca Vega doesn't remember anything of her life prior to waking up in a hospital eight years ago. Now that she and her husband Joe have begun trying to have a child, she has been plagued with headaches and recurring nightmares.

programme.title: 3 Generations
programme.desc: Naomi Watts, Elle Fanning, and Susan Sarandon star in this inspirational, witty, and courageous look at a family learning to accept a transgender teen for who he is.

programme.title: A Single Man
programme.desc: Previously featured at the London Film Festival. A SINGLE MAN, tells the story of a British professor who dwells on the past and cannot see his future. We follow him through a single day, where a series of events leads him to decide if there is meaning to life after the death of his partner,Jim.

programme.title: Freeheld
programme.desc: Diagnosed with terminal cancer, decorated New Jersey detective Laurel Hester (Julianne Moore) wishes to leave her pension benefits to domestic partner Stacie Andree (Elliot Page).

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: Warriors' Gate
programme.desc: American teenager Jack Bronson is magically transported to ancient China, where he must become a hero and rescue a beautiful princess from the clutches of the evil barbarian king.

programme.title: Vantage Point
programme.desc: The attempted assassination of the president is told from five different perspectives.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: Two cops, a rookie and a grizzled vet, pursue an accomplished bank robber.
